positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical, glowing forest scene viewed through a clean, central portal. The scene features stylized bioluminescent flora, giant glowing mushrooms, and gentle forest spirits depicted in silhouettes. The overall composition is clean and centered, with deep emerald and sapphire blue dominating the color palette, accented by vibrant pops of gold and magenta light. The art style should be clean vector illustration mixed with intricate linework, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast between illuminated areas and deep shadows. Graphic novel quality, high detail, perfect composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, photorealistic, grainy, low detail, human figures
